channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for April 14, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.

item.title: NYT Connections Sports Edition today: Hints and answers for April 14, 2026
item.description: Connections: Sports Edition is a New York Times word game about finding common sports threads between words. How to solve the day's puzzle.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for April 14, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for April 14, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for April 14, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1760 on April 14 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: What is the release date for Hacks season 5 episode 2 on HBO Max?
item.description: Deborah started planning her comeback, selling out Madison Square Garden. But when does Hacks season 5 episode 2 drop on HBO Max?
